Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Leadership & Strategy KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.412) to justify inclusion for the VP AI/ML. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world VP AI/ML roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Leadership & Strategy is not a standard competency expectation for VP AI/ML. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP AI/ML competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.412) and edge-domain placement (Leadership & Strategy) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP AI/ML. All passes support exclusion.
